Description: System introduces a Task object as the primary unit of work, replacing chat-centric flow
Record all significant decisions made during task execution in an immutable log

Summary: Separate Conversation Layer from Task Layer
Description: Decouple chat/messages from task execution so conversations are views of tasks rather than system state
Each agent runs in a PTY allowing command execution and live output streaming

Summary: Add Secure Remote Mobile Access via QR Pairing
Description: Enable secure remote access via QR code session pairing from mobile devices
Introduce Team Lead agents responsible for coordinating sub-agents
Allow user to join any team context to observe or interact in real time

Summary: Implement Agent Mentions and Targeted Messaging
Description: Support @agent mentions to direct messages or assign tasks explicitly

Summary: Add Agent Inclusion and Exclusion Controls
Description: Allow dynamic inclusion/exclusion of agents per task or discussion
Structure all work as explicit tasks assigned to agents or teams
Agents collaborate within task context rather than global chat
Provide real-time visibility of agent activity and status
Allow changing underlying model per agent dynamically
Allow replay of full task execution including messages and PTY output
System resolves disagreement between agents via hierarchy or voting

Summary: Implement Scoped Agent Memory Per Task
Description: Agents maintain memory scoped to tasks rather than global state
Allow tasks to fork into alternative implementation paths
Stream PTY output live to UI
Allow user to pause, approve, or modify execution live
Agents respond to system events rather than only chat messages
Store global and task-level decisions for system-wide reference
Support multiple teams with hierarchical leads managing agents
Provide mobile UI for managing tasks, agents, and PTYs
Ensure tasks are the central system entity replacing chat sessions
System resolves disagreement between agents via hierarchy or voting
